mechanics.excerpt: The fight takes place within an area known as Circle of Equals, though the space need not be era circle and can range from few meters to tens of square kilometers size _ Civilian castes aiso treat the Trial Grievance as contest but tailor the competition t0 the skills of the participants For example , disputing merchants might gath: revenue over predetermined period; whoever earned more would win the Trial.
